US: US1: As a coach who frequently messages clients, I want to save and quickly insert predefined responses in chats.
AC: AC1: Add Saved Response button in Editor nav (next to GIF button, tooltip "Saved Responses")
Step:
1. Login as Coach in Pro plan workspace
2. Open chat editor
Title: Saved Response button - display
Expectation: - SHOULD see Saved Response button next to GIF button

Step:
1. Login as Coach in Pro plan workspace
2. Open chat editor
3. Hover over Saved Response button
Title: Saved Response button - tooltip
Expectation: - SHOULD see tooltip "Saved Responses"
